title: xilinx: do not make DSP48E1 a whitebox for ABC9 by default
body:
Since it is a big fat block with little gains expected. Can still be enabled using a macro (in the attached testcase, DSP48E1 is ~8000 AIG nodes, ~18000 wires, 263 inputs and 154 outputs).

And make sure it works when it is enabled by fixing combinatorial loops cause problems in ABC9. Passes `techlibs/xilinx/test_dsp_models.h`.

Should fix #2190.
